variants.name: Hunting Instincts I
variants.description: When another combatant uses an Upgrade or Skill card, gain 1 Commence the Hunt.

variants.name: Hunting Instincts II
variants.description: When another combatant uses an Enhanced or Skill card, gain 1 Commence the Hunt, with a chance to gain 1 additional stack.

variants.name: Hunting Instincts III
variants.description: When another combatant uses an Upgrade or Skill card, gain 1 Commence the Hunt. When triggered, an ally may perform a Coordinated Attack.

variants.name: Hunting Instincts IV
variants.description: Gain Commence the Hunt based on the number of Skill cards in hand.

variants.name: Hunting Instincts V
variants.description: When Hugo uses an Enhance or Skill card, gain 1 Commence the Hunt.

variants.name: Fan of Daggers I
variants.description: Deals multi-hit damage to random enemies and gains Commence the Hunt for each target hit.

variants.name: Fan of Daggers II
variants.description: Deals multi-hit damage and gains 2 Commence the Hunt.

variants.name: Fan of Daggers III
variants.description: Deals high single-target damage. When damage is dealt, an ally performs a Coordinated Attack.

variants.name: Fan of Daggers IV
variants.description: Deals multi-hit damage to random enemies. If Commence the Hunt is active, increases the damage amount.

variants.name: Fan of Daggers V
variants.description: At the start of the turn, deals damage to random enemies and gains Commence the Hunt based on the number of targets hit.

variants.name: Quick Fix I
variants.description: Deals multi-hit damage. If Commence the Hunt is active, draw 1 Attack card.

variants.name: Quick Fix II
variants.description: Deals multi-hit damage. If Commence the Hunt is active, adds 1 hit.

variants.name: Quick Fix III
variants.description: Deals multi-hit damage. If Commence the Hunt is active, draw 2 cards.

variants.name: Quick Fix IV
variants.description: Deals multi-hit damage. If Commence the Hunt is active, increases the action count of all enemies.

variants.name: Quick Fix V
variants.description: Deals damage and adds hits based on the current Commence the Hunt count.

variants.name: Dingo Howling I
variants.description: Grants shield and gains 3 Commence the Hunt.

variants.name: Dingo Howling II
variants.description: Grants shield. If Commence the Hunt is active, increases the shield amount and gains 2 Commence the Hunt.

variants.name: Dingo Howling III
variants.description: When Commence the Hunt is gained, draw 1 Attack card once per turn.

variants.name: Dingo Howling IV
variants.description: Gains 2 Commence the Hunt. Combo effect grants 2 additional Commence the Hunt.

variants.name: Dingo Howling V
variants.description: Gains 2 Commence the Hunt and draws 2 Attack cards.
